original: The Gabilani tech has amber skin, light-gray hair and a somewhat chubby build that is presently concealed under a white catsuit, emphasizing her wide hips, bountiful ass and thick thighs. She is holding a wacky sci-fi gun in one hand, while the other remains close to the grenades on her waist belt. A number of other belts are strung around her legs and fitted with all sorts of tech instruments, though some of them look suspiciously like sex toys. Her eyes are covered by anti-flash goggles, but a crazed smile belies her euphoria.
Fortunately, your airtight equipment protects you!

The ‘projectile’ finds a breach in your defense, seeping through a patch of unprotected [pc.skinFurScalesNoun]. Sensual pleasure spreads from the affected area, and your head gets hazy for a hot second before you manage to refocus on the battle.
